name: kb-for-agents
description: Three-layer knowledge base pattern as installable Codex skills. Progressive-disclosure navigation for agents over codebases and notes archives.

interface.shortDescription: Three-layer knowledge bases for agent navigation
interface.longDescription: Build, query, lint, and maintain a three-layer knowledge base inside a codebase or notes corpus so agents can navigate large context through indexes, summaries, and decision records.
defaultPrompt: Build a KB for this codebase.
Check whether the KB is stale.
